接口 IJavadocDocTemplate<T extends JavadocJavaMethod>

类型参数:
T - extends JavadocJavaMethod
所有超级接口:
IBaseDocBuildTemplate
所有已知实现类:
GRpcDocBuildTemplate, JavadocDocBuildTemplate, RpcDocBuildTemplate
public interface IJavadocDocTemplate<T extends JavadocJavaMethod> extends IBaseDocBuildTemplate
java doc template
从以下版本开始:
3.0.5

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    boolean
    addMethodModifiers()
    Add method modifiers
    default List<T>
    buildServiceMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
    Builds a list of service methods.
    default T
    convertToJavadocJavaMethod(ApiConfig apiConfig, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
    Convert JavaMethod to JavadocJavaMethod
    T

    Create empty JavadocJavaMethod.
    default List<T>

    Get parent class and interface methods
    default T

    Merges two JavadocJavaMethod objects.
    default String

    Get method definition
    default List<T>
    processClassHierarchy(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, Function<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass, List<T>> methodProcessor)
    Processes methods of a given class and its parent or interfaces.
    default List<ApiParam>

    Constructs a list of request parameters.
    default boolean
    skipMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
    Determines whether the specified method should be skipped during documentation generation.

    从接口继承的方法 IBaseDocBuildTemplate

    buildReturnApiParams, convertParamsDataToTree, getJavaParameterList, getMethodReturnType, getRewriteClassName, ignoreParamsSets, ignoreReturnObject, paramCommentResolve, replaceTypeName

  • 方法详细资料

    • addMethodModifiers

      boolean addMethodModifiers()
      Add method modifiers
      返回:
      boolean

    • createEmptyJavadocJavaMethod

      T createEmptyJavadocJavaMethod()
      Create empty JavadocJavaMethod.
      返回:
      empty JavadocJavaMethod

    • convertToJavadocJavaMethod

      default T convertToJavadocJavaMethod(ApiConfig apiConfig, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
      Convert JavaMethod to JavadocJavaMethod
      参数:
      apiConfig - ApiConfig
      method - JavaMethod
      actualTypesMap - Map
      返回:
      JavadocJavaMethod

    • methodDefinition

      default String methodDefinition(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
      Get method definition
      参数:
      method - JavaMethod
      actualTypesMap - Map
      返回:
      String

    • processClassHierarchy

      default List<T> processClassHierarchy(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, Function<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass, List<T>> methodProcessor)
      Processes methods of a given class and its parent or interfaces.
      参数:
      cls - JavaClass
      methodProcessor - Function to process methods from a class
      返回:
      List of documented Java methods

    • getParentsClassAndInterfaceMethods

      default List<T> getParentsClassAndInterfaceMethods(ApiConfig apiConfig, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls)
      Get parent class and interface methods
      参数:
      apiConfig - ApiConfig
      cls - JavaClass
      返回:
      List

    • requestParams

      default List<ApiParam> requestParams(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod javaMethod, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, AtomicInteger atomicInteger, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
      Constructs a list of request parameters.
      参数:
      javaMethod - The JavaMethod object, used to extract method information.
      builder - The ProjectDocConfigBuilder object, containing project configuration details.
      atomicInteger - An AtomicInteger, used to generate unique parameter IDs.
      actualTypesMap - A map of actual types, used for type replacement.
      返回:
      A List of ApiParam objects representing the request parameters or null if no parameters exist.

    • buildServiceMethod

      default List<T> buildServiceMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Builds a list of service methods. This method parses the given Java class, extracts methods that meet certain criteria, and generates corresponding JavadocJavaMethod objects for them.
      参数:
      cls - The Java class to parse.
      apiConfig - The API configuration object, containing rules for documentation generation.
      projectBuilder - The project documentation configuration builder, used to construct project-level documentation configurations.
      返回:
      A list containing documented methods represented as JavadocJavaMethod objects.

    • mergeJavadocMethods

      default T mergeJavadocMethods(T existing, T replacement)
      Merges two JavadocJavaMethod objects. If the existing method lacks certain details (description, detail, author, version) that the replacement method has, those details are copied from the replacement method to the existing method.
      参数:
      existing - The existing JavadocJavaMethod object.
      replacement - The replacement JavadocJavaMethod object.
      返回:
      The merged JavadocJavaMethod object, with details filled in from the replacement method if necessary.

    • skipMethod

      default boolean skipMethod(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass cls, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, ApiConfig apiConfig, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Determines whether the specified method should be skipped during documentation generation.

      If this method returns true, the method will be excluded from the generated documentation. If it returns false, the method will be included.

      The default implementation always returns false, meaning no methods are skipped by default. Subclasses may override this method to provide custom logic for excluding certain methods.

      参数:
      cls - The Java class containing the method.
      method - The Java method to check.
      apiConfig - The API configuration object, used to control documentation behavior.
      projectBuilder - The project documentation configuration builder.
      返回:
      true if the method should be skipped (not documented), false if it should be included.
